name: set_status
_note: sub_worlds.set_status pauses/resumes a world the actor owns or co-edits. status must be 'active' or 'paused' (archive is a separate macro). A missing/unknown worldId returns ok:false 'world not found'; an unauthorized actor returns ok:false 'not authorized'. The assassin drives it with no live world, so ok:false is correct (not no_db). Live STATE + actor — never no_db.
